backstory.original: Gazrick Nomrad is just your standard gnome druid/businessman/detective/chef/socialist construct. Harnessing the magic of all things cold, he brings a wealth of frost-based spells to the table, as well as insisting his actions are not weird. They are.
backstory.display: 以你的标准来看，加兹里克·诺姆拉德是一个侏儒德鲁伊/商人/侦探/大厨/社会主义构装生物。他利用魔法操控一切寒冷之物，带来了众多以冰霜为基础的法术，并且坚称他的行为不古怪。那些行为真的很古怪。

description.original: Gazrick attacks the closest enemy with magic dealing damage with a chance to stun them.
description.display: 加兹里克使用法术攻击距离最近的敌人，并有几率使其眩晕。

longDescription.original: Gazrick attacks the closest enemy with a magic attack that causes one hit and a 50% chance that the enemy is stunned for 2 seconds.
longDescription.display: 加兹里克使用法术攻击距离最近的敌人，造成一次伤害并有 50% 几率使该敌人眩晕 2 秒。

description.original: Gazrick summons a sleet storm above the nearest enemy dealing damage and freezing the ground in a large AOE radius.
description.display: 加兹里克在距离最近的敌人上方召唤一场雪雨暴，在大范围内造成伤害并使地面冻结。

longDescription.original: Gazrick summons a sleet storm above the nearest enemy dealing damage and freezing the ground in a large AOE radius. The frozen ground lasts for 30 seconds slowing enemies by 50% while they travel through it. If not already snowing, it begins to snow until the area changes.
longDescription.display: 加兹里克在距离最近的敌人上方召唤一场雪雨暴，在大范围内造成伤害并使地面冻结。地面冻结效果持续 30 秒。敌人从冻结的地面上走过时，行进速度会减缓 50%。如果之前没有下雪，会开始下雪直到区域改变。

description.original: Gazrick buffs Champions in a unique snowflake formation
description.display: 加兹里克为独特雪花阵型中的勇士提供增益

description.original: Gazrick attacks reduce the amount of damage required to destroy a section of enemy armor
description.display: 加兹里克的攻击会降低摧毁敌人的每格护甲所需的伤害量

description.pre: $(source_hero) increases the damage of all Champions in a snowflake shape. The damage bonus depends on how far away they are from $(source_hero), with the effect increasing for each slot.
$(source_hero)会提高雪花阵型中所有勇士的伤害。伤害加成取决于他们与$(source_hero)的距离，距离每远一格，加成效果都会增加。

tipText.original: Gazrick buffs all Champions in a unique snowflake formation
tipText.display: 加兹里克为独特雪花阵型中的所有勇士提供增益

description.desc: $(source_hero) now travels with a portable stall to sell his merch. Increase the gold find bonus by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Rivals of Waterdeep member in the formation, including himself.
$(source_hero)现在背着一个便携式货摊上路，沿途贩卖他的商品。使阵型中所有“深水城的竞争对手”成员的金币寻获加成提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，包括他自己。

$(source_hero)'s cold attacks lowers an enemy's armor threshold by $(amount___2)% for $(amount) seconds. Only applies to armored enemies. Stacks up to $(max_ablation_stacks) times, but each stack tracks its own duration.
$(source_hero)的寒冷攻击会使一名敌人的护甲阈值降低 $(amount___2)%，持续 $(amount) 秒。只对披甲的敌人有效。最多可堆叠 $(max_ablation_stacks) 层，但每层的持续时间独立计算。

tipText.original: Gazrick reduces the amount of damage required to destroy a section of armor from an armored enemy
tipText.display: 加兹里克会降低摧毁重甲敌人的每格护甲所需的伤害量

description.desc: $(source_hero) causes enemies to take an additional $(amount)% damage in areas where it is snowing.
$(source_hero)在下雪的区域中会使敌人额外受到 $(amount)% 伤害。
$(source_hero) increases the effect of Travelling Merchant by $(amount)%.

specializationDescription.display: 加兹里克专注于他的器物

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the duration of Armor Ablation by $(amount)%.
$(source_hero)会使护甲消融术的持续时间增加 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.display: 加兹里克专注于冻结敌人的护甲

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the effect of Control Weather by $(amount)%.

specializationDescription.original: Gazrick focuses on debuffing cold enemies
specializationDescription.display: 加兹里克专注于减益被冷冻的敌人

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"add_attack_targets,1,506","description":"Increases the number of Missiles fired by Gazrick's Frostbite by $amount"}

description.original: The cold is good for your circulation.
description.display: 寒冷对你的血液循环有好处。

description.original: This is a very fair price!
description.display: 这是个非常公道的价格！

description.original: In prison, I ate my lunch in the bathroom...It's not that weird.
description.display: 在监狱里，我都是在厕所吃午餐的......没什么大不了的。

description.original: Everything I need is in this pack.
description.display: 我需要的所有东西都在这个背包里。

description.original: Time to hunker down. Anyone got bread?
description.display: 是时候休息了。谁带面包了？

description.original: Part of the fun is never knowing where you will set up next!
description.display: 有部分有意思的是，永远不知道你接下来会在哪里落脚！

description.original: Well, isn't that a kind thing to say!
description.display: 好吧，这么说真是太好了！

character_sheet_details.backstory: Gazrick Nomrad is just your standard gnome druid/businessman/detective/chef/socialist construct. Harnessing the magic of all things cold, he brings a wealth of frost-based spells to the table, as well as insisting his actions are not weird. They are.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Gazrick is a Support / Gold Find Champion whose cold attacks reduce the strength of enemy armor
